message:
fix(tui): pause terminal UI before launching external editor

When opening an external editor (e.g., vim, nano, code --wait) from the
TUI, the editor needs a normal terminal — not one in raw mode on the
alternate screen. Without this fix, editors would render incorrectly or
fail to accept input because crossterm's raw mode intercepts keystrokes.

Changes:
- Disable raw mode and leave alternate screen before spawning editor
- Re-enter alternate screen, re-enable raw mode, and clear screen after
  editor exits
- Defer the editor status error check until after terminal restoration
  to ensure the TUI is always properly resumed even on editor failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
